body:
## What changed
- remove the discard count panel from the right-side score panel in GamePage
- keep the discard action button and its count badge for action-local feedback

## Why
- the discard count was being shown twice in the same sidebar
- keeping the count on the button preserves the actionable state while simplifying the UI

## Impact
- reduces duplicated discard-state UI in the game sidebar
- keeps discard availability visible at the point of interaction

## Validation
- confirmed the PR branch contains only the ScorePanel.jsx change
- attempted to run frontend lint, but this branch is cut from main and CardGame/frontend/package.json on main does not define a lint script
title: fix(frontend): Remove discard count panel from score panel
